headline: AST SpaceMobile Is Either a Revolutionary Telecom Or an Accident Waiting to Happen
summary: AST SpaceMobile’s  quarterly results show the peril of operating in space—and being a high-expectation stock.  There was a silver lining for investors, though.  It’s a miss, but AST maintained full-year revenue guidance of between $150 million and $200 million.

headline: The 3-Bucket Income Portfolio: How to Build $5,000 a Month From Dividends, Bonds, and REITs
summary: Pulling $5,000 a month from a portfolio is a common benchmark for early retirees who want a middle-class income floor without relying on full-time work. It can help cover property taxes, insurance, healthcare premiums, groceries, utilities, and the basics of a comfortable middle-class life in many parts of the country. headline: Apple And Google Finally Close SMS Security Gap As iOS 26.5 Brings End-To-End Encrypted RCS Messaging For Android And iPhone Conversations
